authority: The engine and executable guards determine admission. V39 is a named forward-forcing reconciliation of the complete sealed V38 fixed-point grammar through the registered peptide-construction causal order.

composition.parent_grammar: All four V38 fixed points remain sealed and source-bound.
composition.chain_direction: The registered backbone builder advances through increasing residue indices from N to C.
composition.axis_order: Phi places C_i at causal rank three; psi places N_(i+1) at rank four, exactly one event later.
composition.runtime_uniqueness: Exactly one V38 fixed point has both N-to-C direction and phi-before-psi order.

required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: Generated assembly enumeration proves neither the phi event rank nor the bare One reaches the subsequent psi event rank.
required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: The colour-count N/CA/C window, One advance, quartet rank, V38 complete fixed-point grammar and registered target-incapable backbone builder are already closed and source-bound.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Ernos and Python guards halt on event-rank, direction, parent grammar, uniqueness, source, configuration or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: V39 checks the complete four-row V38 boundary/axis-order Cartesian grammar and accepts exactly one causal row.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: The selected fixed point was generated and sealed in V38 before comparison; V39 reads only the registered seal and selected-state record.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Among one-operation +,-,*,/ forms over phi rank three and the One, only addition reaches the subsequent psi rank four.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before promotion and recorded separately by the sealed ubiquitin L76 cumulative development benchmark.
